name: aeroftp-mcp
description: Configure the AeroFTP MCP server for Claude Code, Claude Desktop, Cursor, and Windsurf. Access 39 file management tools across 22 storage protocols (FTP, SFTP, S3, WebDAV, Google Drive, Dropbox, OneDrive, and more) directly from your AI assistant. New in v3.7.0: cross-profile transfer (transfer / transfer_tree copy single files or whole trees between two saved profiles in one batch with credentials staying inside Rust), per-group caps on check_tree (max_match / max_differ / max_missing_local / max_missing_remote + omit_match), and six new ops tools — touch (create empty file), cleanup (BFS scan for orphan .aerotmp files, dry-run by default), speed (random-payload upload+download throughput probe with SHA-256 integrity), sync_doctor (preflight risk summary with suggested_next_command), dedupe (SHA-256 duplicate detection grouped per size, dry-run by default), reconcile (categorized size-only diff variant of check_tree). Highlights from previous releases still apply: sync_tree per-file delta breakdown (summary.delta_files[]) and dry-run plan[], check_tree two-sided checksum comparison with compare_method on every entry, read_file soft-truncated preview (truncated:true) instead of error when a file sits above the requested window but under the 1 MB hard cap, delete_many batches with server-friendly backoff, list_servers name_contains/protocol/limit/offset filters, upload_file recursive create_parents, connection pool auto-recovery on transport failures, real-time progress notifications during uploads, downloads, and sync operations. Requires AeroFTP CLI v3.7.0 or later.

aeroftp-mcp.cliPath.markdownDescription: Absolute path to `aeroftp-cli` binary. Leave empty for automatic detection via PATH.

aeroftp-mcp.showStatusBar.description: Show AeroFTP MCP status in the status bar.

walkthroughs.title: Set up AeroFTP MCP Server
walkthroughs.description: Connect Claude Code to your remote servers via AeroFTP

steps.title: Install AeroFTP CLI
steps.description:
AeroFTP CLI must be installed on your system.

**Linux (Snap)**
```
sudo snap install aeroftp
```

**Linux (AUR)**
```
yay -S aeroftp-bin
```

**Linux (deb/rpm/AppImage)**: Download from [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/axpdev-lab/aeroftp/releases)

**macOS/Windows**: Download from [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/axpdev-lab/aeroftp/releases)

[Verify installation](command:aeroftp-mcp.diagnose)

steps.title: Configure MCP Server
steps.description:
Register the AeroFTP MCP server in Claude Code's configuration.

[Install MCP Server](command:aeroftp-mcp.install)

steps.title: Verify Setup
steps.description:
Check that everything is working correctly.

[Check Status](command:aeroftp-mcp.status)
